name: iron Library Maintenance Pipeline
description: Live status graph for development, tests, and docs generation.

root.label: Plan and scope feature change
root.details: Identify touched commands, options, tests, and docs.

children.label: Implement source changes
children.details: Wire commands and keep modules maintainable.

children.label: Run smoke tests
children.details: Run nimble test and resolve regressions.

children.label: Generate docs bridge
children.details: Run iron docs and verify markdown/json output.
